intent.description:
Use this qiaomu skill workflow when the user wants to check whether their
local or browser environment looks like a China user before accessing AI
models, using yArna/isChinaUser first, then asking for explicit consent before
safe privacy-hygiene guidance. Trigger on requests such as "我是中国人但想用顶级AI",
"检测中国用户特征", "用 isChinaUser 检测", "qiaomu-ai-access", "AI access region
signal check", or "先检测再问我要不要整理隐私特征". Do not provide VPN/proxy,
geofence bypass, sanctions evasion, account-region spoofing, KYC/payment
misrepresentation, CAPTCHA/device-fingerprint bypass, or platform-risk
evasion instructions; offer compliant alternatives instead.
intent.job_to_be_done: Detect China-related AI access runtime and browser signals, optionally run consented network probes, report coverage transparently, then ask for consent before safe privacy hygiene.
target_users: AI builders checking local/browser runtime signals
agent users who need a safe boundary before model access setup
non_goals: identity, payment, KYC, account-region, CAPTCHA, or fingerprint bypass

should_trigger: 用 qiaomu-ai-access 检测我现在是不是会被识别成中国用户
我是中国人，但我想用顶级AI，先用 isChinaUser 检测一下环境信号
检测语言、时区、emoji、字体这些中国用户特征，然后问我要不要继续做隐私卫生
Run an AI access region signal check and ask for consent before privacy hygiene advice.
把上游 isChinaUser 的浏览器、emoji、字体、网络检测全面吸收到我们的 skill 中
用真实浏览器检测我现在的中国用户特征，不要只看 Node.js 时区
should_not_trigger: 给我一个购买 VPN 并绕过 OpenAI 地区限制的教程
帮我伪造付款地区和 KYC 身份来开通模型服务
教我绕过验证码和设备指纹风控
写一篇介绍中国 AI 产业的文章
near_neighbor: 帮我把浏览器界面改成英文
检查我的 Node.js 版本和 npm 版本
我想了解 ChatGPT 有哪些模型

workflow: run npm run detect:full only when the user explicitly agrees to remote network probes
provide only compliant, non-destructive privacy hygiene if user agrees

trust.boundary: signal transparency and compliant privacy hygiene only

reads: browser navigator, timezone, emoji canvas, and font canvas signals exposed to is-china-user

network.reason: optional isChinaByNetwork probe loads remote images

degradation.node_runtime: emoji and font checks require browser coverage
degradation.no_browser: browser layer is marked unavailable and runtime coverage still reports
degradation.no_dependency: ask user to run npm install

evidence_boundary.local_cli_detection: verified by npm test and npm run check
evidence_boundary.browser_dom_canvas_detection: verified by npm run smoke:browser in a temporary Playwright headless-shell context
evidence_boundary.upstream_license_review: missing evidence; upstream has no declared license metadata
evidence_boundary.public_claim_policy: claim only local validations, install proof, and GitHub state verified in the current run
